title: BEM-1257 capture validator
objective:
Create file governance/validators/validate_unified_capture_result.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

FORBIDDEN_TRUE_FIELDS = {"release_pass"}
FORBIDDEN_TEXT = {"release_pass_true", "production_claim", "live_runtime_claim", "external_claude_claim"}


def validate(path):
    data = json.loads(Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    errors = []
    if data.get("release_pass") is not False:
        errors.append("release_pass must be false for unified capture result")
    if data.get("unified_capture") is not True:
        errors.append("unified_capture must be true")
    if "results" not in data or not isinstance(data.get("results"), list):
        errors.append("results list missing")
    text = json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False).lower()
    for token in FORBIDDEN_TEXT:
        if token in text:
            errors.append(f"forbidden token found: {token}")
    return errors

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import sys
    if len(sys.argv) != 2:
        print("usage: validate_unified_capture_result.py <result.json>")
        raise SystemExit(2)
    errs = validate(sys.argv[1])
    if errs:
        print("FAIL")
        for err in errs:
            print(err)
        raise SystemExit(1)
    print("PASS unified_capture_result")
